basic_details.job_title: GGSMCH Project Technical Support-III Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Guru Gobind Singh Medical College and Hospital (GGSMCH)
basic_details.short_information: Guru Gobind Singh Medical College and Hospital (GGSMCH) Project Technical Support-III (Research Coordinator) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website ggsmch.org. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the GGSMCH Project Technical Support-III (Research Coordinator) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years as on 28-07-2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.B.B.S, B.D.S, Three-year Graduation in Medical Subject/field or equivalent with three-year post qualification experience, Post Graduate in medical Subject/field (Medical/Nursing/Physiotherapy/Pharm D/Dental or equivalent), Degree/Diploma in Clinical Research, Experience of Trial/Studies for 2 years or Equivalent knowledge of computers

content_sections.heading: GGSMCH Project Technical Support-III Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the GGSMCH Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download GGSMCH Project Technical Support-III Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: M.B.B.S OR B.D.S OR Three-year Graduation in Medical Subject/field or equivalent and three-year post qualification experience OR Post Graduate in medical Subject/field. Subject: Medical/Nursing/Physiotherapy/Pharm D/Dental or equivalent. Desirable: Degree/Diploma in Clinical Research OR Experience of Trial/Studies for 2 year or Equivalent knowledge of computers

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years as on 28-07-2026.

content_sections.heading: GGSMCH Project Technical Support-III Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Application

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: GGSMCH Project Technical Support-III Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the GGSMCH recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of the application for the GGSMCH recruitment is 27th July 2026. Candidates are advised to ensure their application is submitted by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the walk-in interview date for the Project Technical Support-III post?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Project Technical Support-III (Research Coordinator) post is scheduled to be held on 28th July 2026. Candidates should report at the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Project Technical Support-III (Research Coordinator) post is 35 years as of 28th July 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Technical Support-III position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Technical Support-III (Research Coordinator) post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 28,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. What are the essential qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Essential qualifications include M.B.B.S OR B.D.S OR a Three-year Graduation in a Medical Subject/field with three years of post-qualification experience, or a Post Graduate degree in a Medical Subject/field.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any desirable qualification mentioned?
faq.answer: Yes, a Degree/Diploma in Clinical Research or 2 years of experience in Trial/Studies or equivalent computer knowledge is considered desirable.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for General/OBC category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for candidates belonging to the General and OBC categories is Rs. 1770.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application fee for SC/ST category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for candidates belonging to the SC/ST categories is Rs. 885.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve Document Verification, a Written Test, and an Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Guru Gobind Singh Medical College and Hospital, Faridkot, Punjab, 151203. Candidates must report to the specified venue.
